Now in terms of the 12 core learning modules, eight of them are focused on what I refer to as outer world distinctions of the straight line system, meaning they deal with the actual tactics and strategies you'll be using in the real world whenever you enter a sales encounter or a negotiation or basically any situation of influence, whether it's in your business life or your personal life. Then the remaining four modules are focused on the so-called inner world distinctions of the straight line, which are the actual tactics and strategies that takes place right up here between your ears for you ever go out into the world and take action. See your ability to achieve success at any aspect of your life, and this is especially true in sales, it always begins right up here between your ears inside your own mind with using the ability to manage your emotional state, having empowering belief systems, maintaining high personal standards and also harnessing the power of something called vision focus. And together, these inner world distinctions then feel to achieve massive success in the outer world of sales with using the straight line system to dramatically ramp up your closing rate, shorten your sales cycle and get a massive number of referrals as you go about creating those all important customers for life. They're every bit as important as the outer world modules, because what happens up here and also right in here in your gut is what sets you up for massive success in the outer world. In fact, people always ask me, they say, you know, how am I able to do what I do so well? However, now this is a very big however, what's important on the stand here is that selling and persuading is not about getting people to do things that they should not be doing. Rather, sales is about empowering people to overcome the barriers and obstacles that stop them from taking actions they should in fact be taking. In other words, there are all these people out there who are basically shut down or blocked from buying things, even when it's something that would actually be in their best interest to buy. Whether it's a limiting belief they have about buying or a fear of looking for a shift they buy or perhaps at a really big experience with a salesperson in the past who's now poisoned their mind and started with any salesperson, even a legit one like you who truly has their best interest at heart. Whatever the case, one of the true beauties of the straight line system is it will give you the ability to help these people overcome these barriers and obstacles that stop them from taking actions so they can now get the things they truly need like. That's what ethical sales and persuasion is all about.
